Set up your free social media subdomain!
Your domain comes with free, customizable subdomains such as facebook.sachistream.info to link to your social media page.
Improved SEO
Social subdomains can help your website rank higher in search engines.
Promote your social page
Anybody visiting your social subdomain such as facebook.sachistream.info will see your social media page.
Add to your main domain
Creating a social subdomain won't affect anything currently connected to sachistream.info.
